MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN OCTOBER 22, 2013 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT DEBRA SCHOENBERG'S MOTION TO SEAL - THE MOTION TO FILE THE DISCOVERY DOCUMENTS THAT ARE THE SUBJECT OF THIS MOTION UNDER SEAL, AND TO SUBSTITUTE REDACTED COPIES IN THE PUBLIC FILE THAT IDENTIFY THE MINORS AS "L.S." AND "B. SCHOENBERG" IS GRANTED, FOR GOOD CAUSE SHOWN. NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED. THIS ORDER APPLIES TO THE FOLLOWING DOCUMENTS: DEBRA R. SCHOENBERG'S SEPARATE STATEMENT OF ITEMS IN DISPUTE, FILED JULY 29, 2013; AND MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT OF RESPONDENT'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS SET ONE AND FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS (FILED JULY 29, 2013). THESE DOCUMENTS SHALL BE SEALED, AND REDACTED COPIES SHALL REPLACE THESE PLEADINGS IN THE PUBLIC FILE. COUNSEL FOR MOVING PARTY MUST PROVIDE THIS ORDER AND REDACTED COPIES TO THE CLERK'S OFFICE. THIS ORDER DOES NOT APPLY TO ANY OTHER DOCUMENTS IN THIS ACTION. FURTHER, IN THEIR STIPULATION FOR MOTION TO SEAL, FILED AUGUST 19, 2013, THE PARTIES HAVE STIPULATED THAT THE MINOR CHILD WHO IS MENTIONED IN CROSS-COMPLAINANT'S PLEADING SHALL BE IDENTIFIED AS "L.S." IN THIS ACTION. BASED ON THE STIPULATION, IT IS SO ORDERED. (MOVING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185 (302/MJM)
MINI MINUTES FOR NOV-04-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-13-2014 Vacated

Mtn To Seal; Stip
Off Calendar Nov-04-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT DEBRA SCHOENBERG's Motion To Seal- The motion to file the discovery documents that are the subject of this motion under seal, and to substitute redacted copies in the public file that identify the minors as "L.S." and "B. Schoenberg" is granted, for good cause shown. No opposition was filed. This order applies to the following documents: Debra R. Schoenberg's Separate Statement of Items in Dispute, filed July 29, 2013; and Memorandum of Points and Authorities in Support of Respondent's Motion to Compel Further Responses to Request for Production of Documents Set One and for Attorney Fees and Costs (filed July 29, 2013). These documents shall be sealed, and redacted copies shall replace these pleadings in the public file. Counsel for moving party must provide this Order and redacted copies to the clerk's office. This order does not apply to any other documents in this action.
Further, in their Stipulation for Motion to Seal, filed August 19, 2013, the parties have stipulated that the minor child who is mentioned in Cross-Complainant's pleading shall be identified as "L.S." in this action. Based on the stipulation, it is so ordered. (Moving party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

Mtn To Seal; Stip
Off Calendar Oct-22-2013 Continued To Nov-04-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT DEBRA SCHOENBERG'S MOTION TO SEAL.

No appearances. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Continued to November 4, 2013 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than October 22, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the proposed order only. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Reporter: Tony Vaughn CSR #6185 (302/MJM)
